description.content: Madlang People! Welcome to the official YouTube channel of It's Showtime - ABS-CBN's multi-awarded & longest-running noontime show. Began as a search for the country’s most entertaining acts turned out to be a hit variety program that launched a thousand trends for Filipinos.

aboutChannelViewModel.description: Madlang People! Welcome to the official YouTube channel of It's Showtime - ABS-CBN's multi-awarded & longest-running noontime show. Began as a search for the country’s most entertaining acts turned out to be a hit variety program that launched a thousand trends for Filipinos.
